name: Urocynchramidae
description: Urocynchramidae is a monotypic family of passerine bird endemic to the mountains of western China. The single species was traditionally placed with the buntings but is now recognized as a distinct, ancient lineage.

children.name: Urocynchramus
children.description: A monotypic genus of long-tailed finch-like bird endemic to the mountains of central China.
